package.name: qr_dock_kf
package.description:
Kalman-filtered QR docking for the TCSM Puzzlebot forklift.
Self-contained alternative to robot_dock_twostep. Detects a QR with cv2.QRCodeDetector + IPPE (two-solution disambiguation), tracks the marker pose with a 3-DOF (x, y, yaw) Kalman filter driven by the robot's own ego-motion (so it keeps a valid estimate while the QR is briefly lost), and docks via a waypoint-on-the-normal state machine that re-references the QR up close. The yaw measurement is deliberately distrusted (large R_yaw); perpendicularity comes from routing through a waypoint on the QR's outward normal rather than from the noisy instantaneous plane-yaw.
Does NOT modify the EKF / MCL / ArUco localization stack. Publishes to alignment_cmd_vel (merged in cmd_vel_mux) and /align/done, like the other aligners. Inspired by dawan0111/Auto-Marker-Docking.
